pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
Upgrade the modelmapper dependency to version 3.2.6.

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Replace string concatenation with a text block to utilize Java 15+ multi-line string syntax.
Remove unused Lombok import for local variable type inference.
Replace Lombok 'val' with Java 10+ 'var' for local variable type inference.
Remove unused import for Lombok's type inference feature.
Remove unused static import for String formatting.
Replace Lombok's val keyword with Java's final var for type inference.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.before: val msg = "Departure and destination airport cannot be the same!";
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.after: final var msg = "Departure and destination airport cannot be the same!";

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Replace Lombok's val keyword with Java's final var for type inference.

Replace String.format with String.formatted method introduced in Java 15.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.before: val msg = format("No flights were found from %s to %s on %s", departureAirport, destinationAirport, departureTime);
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.after: final var msg = "No flights were found from %s to %s on %s".formatted(departureAirport, destinationAirport, departureTime);

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted method introduced in Java 15.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.before:
val msg = format("%s
%s
%s
%s", messageOnFail, e.getMessage(), e.getLocalizedMessage(), e.fillInStackTrace());
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.after:
final var msg = "%s
%s
%s
%s".formatted(messageOnFail, e.getMessage(), e.getLocalizedMessage(), e.fillInStackTrace());
